title: Blog
body: Thoughts, learnings, and updates on things I’m building.

title: Hello, World!
body: Welcome to my new blog! This is the first post. I’ll be sharing my thoughts, learnings, and projects here soon. Stay tuned!

title: Home
body:
Hi, I’m Bikash.
I’m a full-stack developer who enjoys building software that solves real problems. Most of my time is spent working with modern web technologies, experimenting with AI agents, and learning how intelligent systems work under the hood.
I like keeping things simple, writing clean code, and turning ideas into products people can actually use. When I’m not building something, you’ll probably find me exploring new technologies, or diving deeper into computer science.
